Video.summary: Robert shares the chain of events that inspired him to devote his life to volunteerism and how this can bring deeper meaning to your life and soul too.
Video.title: How to Live and Lead with Kindness With Robert Clancy

Image.alt: How to Live and Lead with Kindness With Robert Clancy
How to Live and Lead with Kindness With Robert Clancy
How to Live and Lead with Kindness With Robert Clancy

Video.summary: Today Lisa speaks with Udo Erasmus, best-selling author of “Fats that Heal, Fats that Kill.” As an expert in health and healing, he talks about “good fats,” healthy eating, and ways to reconnect to the self and live a life of thriving! Info: Udoschoice.com.
Video.title: The Aware Show - Healthy Fats that Heal

Image.alt: The Aware Show - Healthy Fats that Heal
The Aware Show - Healthy Fats that Heal
The Aware Show - Healthy Fats that Heal

Video.summary: Lisa Garr talks with Dr. Harley Rotbart, a nationally renowned pediatrician, who speaks about his book “No Regrets Living” which outlines keys to living a life of wonder & contentment including self-forgiveness, opening to miracles, & discovery.
Video.title: The Aware Show - No Regrets Living

Image.alt: The Aware Show - No Regrets Living
The Aware Show - No Regrets Living
The Aware Show - No Regrets Living

Video.summary: Lisa Garr talks with Fast Company Senior writer Nicole LaPorte. She researched the divide between the haves & have-nots including examining the vicious competitiveness of college admissions, bribes & lack of ethics within certain departments.
Video.title: The Aware Show - College Admissions Scams Exposed

Image.alt: The Aware Show - College Admissions Scams Exposed
The Aware Show - College Admissions Scams Exposed
The Aware Show - College Admissions Scams Exposed

Video.summary: Lisa Garr talks with best-selling author and spiritual teacher Anita Moorjani, who discusses life as an empath. Her latest book is “Sensitive is the New Strong,” which talks about the importance of having boundaries, especially as an empathic person.
Video.title: The Aware Show - Sensitive is the New Strong

Image.alt: The Aware Show - Sensitive is the New Strong
The Aware Show - Sensitive is the New Strong
The Aware Show - Sensitive is the New Strong

Video.summary: Ever have the post-sex blues? You aren’t alone. Plus, why cheating isn’t always about sex. All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - What are the Post-Sex Blues?

Image.alt: Sex Talk - What are the Post-Sex Blues?
Sex Talk - What are the Post-Sex Blues?
Sex Talk - What are the Post-Sex Blues?

Video.summary: Are you getting back into the dating game and wondering what to expect? And ever wonder why a kiss leaves you dizzy with desire? Answers to these questions and more this week on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - Can You Want Too Much Sex?

Image.alt: Sex Talk - Can You Want Too Much Sex?
Sex Talk - Can You Want Too Much Sex?
Sex Talk - Can You Want Too Much Sex?

Video.summary: Are you getting back into the dating game and wondering what to expect? And ever wonder why a kiss leaves you dizzy with desire? Answers to these questions and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - How Kissing Can Change Your Sex Life

Image.alt: Sex Talk - How Kissing Can Change Your Sex Life
Sex Talk - How Kissing Can Change Your Sex Life
Sex Talk - How Kissing Can Change Your Sex Life

Video.summary: DR. GEORGIY BRUSOVANIK - Preparing for Surgery DR. DEREK PAPP & TORRE WASHINGTON - Types of Plant-Based Diets DR. MICHAEL SWARTZON - Hydration & Athletes
Video.title: Health Insiders S1E20

Video.summary: MARCO BORGES & NATALIE CASTRO - Nutrition DR. JACOB STEIGER - Tech Neck DR. ITALO LINFANTE - Neuroradiology
Video.title: Health Insiders S1E21

Video.summary: DR. LUIS RODRIGUEZ - Fractures DR. DANIEL MARTINEZ - Prostate Cancer DR. GEORGIY BRUSOVANIK - Preparing for Surgery
Video.title: Health Insiders S1E22

Video.summary: DR. ANTHONY GONZALEZ - Obesity JASON MELAND - Sports Medicine DR. GEORGIY BRUSOVANIK - Preventing Infections Post-Surgery
Video.title: Health Insiders S1E23

Video.summary: Day one of our challenge centers around commitment, so Kino is asking you start by going all in on 31 days of practice with her.
Video.title: Day 1: Yoga is Commitment

Video.summary: Tune in and learn alignment and articulation in the body that will help you tap into new levels of strength.
Video.title: Day 2: Strength Plank

Video.summary: Venture deep into the realm of body and mind in this sequence focused on an experience of santosha, the yogic notion of contentment.
Video.title: Day 3 Acceptance/Contentment Upward Facing Dog

Video.summary: Day 4 is about finding balance.
Video.title: Day 4: Balance Tree Pose

Video.summary: In our very first solo episode of Rooted in Wellness, we explore the transformative power of being anchored like a sturdy tree—steady, grounded, and unwavering amidst life's storms. We'll illuminate how feeling rooted manifests as inner peace, emotional stability, and a profound connection with yourself and the world around you.
Video.title: 1. 5 Ways to Become Rooted in Wellness

Image.alt: 1. 5 Ways to Become Rooted in Wellness
1. 5 Ways to Become Rooted in Wellness
1. 5 Ways to Become Rooted in Wellness

Video.summary: Have you ever felt like your hormones are playing a tune out of sync with your well-being? Chances are, they probably are. The good news? There's a transformative journey waiting for women when they realign with nature, pay attention to their meals, and practice intermittent fasting the right way.
Video.title: Dr. Mindy Pelz: How to Become Hormonally Literate through Ancient Healing Practices

Image.alt: Dr. Mindy Pelz: How to Become Hormonally Literate through Ancient Healing Practices
Dr. Mindy Pelz: How to Become Hormonally Literate through Ancient Healing Practices
Dr. Mindy Pelz: How to Become Hormonally Literate through Ancient Healing Practices

Video.summary: Did you know that your metabolic health and energy are controlled by our modern food? This means your metabolism is not broken! You just need to work on healing your metabolism through simple lifestyle shifts you can easily apply to your life today.How? This is what we dive into in this episode of Rooted in Wellness with Casey Means.
Video.title: Dr. Casey Means: Finding Optimal Metabolic Health through Ancient Wisdom

Image.alt: Dr. Casey Means: Finding Optimal Metabolic Health through Ancient Wisdom
Dr. Casey Means: Finding Optimal Metabolic Health through Ancient Wisdom
Dr. Casey Means: Finding Optimal Metabolic Health through Ancient Wisdom

Video.summary: Priscilla Leona talks about her film projects, LA Talk Radio Show and more.
Video.title: LSWMH - Priscilla Leona

Video.summary: Actress Annie Wood talks about women's empowerment and her work as an author. She will also speak about her experiences as the host of the dating game show BZZZ!.
Video.title: LSWMH - Annie Wood

Video.summary: Princess Maja Von Hohenzollern is featured on Life Stories with Marc Hoberman. Her Royal Highness speaks about royalty, business, and her incredible passion as an animal activist.
Video.title: LSWMH - Princess Maja von Hohenzollern

Video.summary: Alcohol is the world’s most powerful drug. Four billion people drink it regularly and the number is rising. Of the world’s 30 countries with the highest per capita alcohol consumption, no fewer than 26 are in Europe. Big business with 3 million victims each year. But who profits from all this?
Video.title: ALCOHOL - THE MAGIC POTION

Video.summary: Director Kelly Noonan Gores’ HEAL takes us on a scientific and spiritual journey where we discover that our thoughts, beliefs, and emotions have a huge impact on our health and ability to heal. We have more control over our health and life than we have been taught to believe.
Video.title: HEAL

Video.summary: Admissions tells a transformational tale about what it takes to find lasting peace.
Video.title: Admissions

Video.summary: A wise master is called upon to heal a painfully misguided cyberbully and his tragic victim
Video.title: The Principle

Video.summary: A film about Christopher Kirkley’s project Sahel Sounds, which celebrates musical performances of current artists from Niger, while leaving room to reflect on today’s role of ethnomusicology.
Video.title: A STORY OF SAHEL SOUNDS
